output.formatted:
Based on the Wikidata query, no NFL teams with wide receivers from the specified universities could be found in the current dataset. This may be due to incomplete data in Wikidata regarding college affiliations of NFL players.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?team ?teamLabel WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P106 wd:Q214710 .
  ?player wdt:P69 ?university .
  VALUES ?university {
    wd:Q245476 wd:Q401278 wd:Q21844
  }
  ?player p:P54 ?teamStatement .
  ?teamStatement ps:P54 ?team .
  ?team wdt:P463 wd:Q13675 .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?team rdfs:label ?teamLabel .
    FILTER(lang(?teamLabel) = "en")
  }
}
```

Execution result:
Got no rows and 2 columns
